name: BrowserAct
description: Automates real-Chrome browser sessions for AI agents — breaks through anti-bot walls, isolates multi-account sessions, runs parallel tasks, and hands off to humans when stuck.

skills.name: Anti-Bot Evasion
skills.description: Drives real Chrome sessions that pass anti-bot and verification walls that block headless automation.

skills.name: Multi-Session Isolation
skills.description: Runs isolated multi-account browser sessions in parallel so agents operate many logins without cross-contamination.

skills.name: Human Handoff
skills.description: Hands control to a human when a task gets stuck, then resumes automated execution afterward.
